title: Operations
description: Activities directly related to the acquisition, archiving, distribution, and processing of mission-related information.

definitions.definition: Activities directly related to the acquisition, archiving, distribution, and processing of mission-related information.
definitions.notes: Relating to the NESDIS user requirements for routine data and services with established schedules, formats, and completeness. - UE Lexicon
